summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CodeForge AI platform v2.0 - All requested features working. Preview buttons (Web, PDF, DOCX, App) visible on Create and Chat pages. SMS authentication fully functional (MOCKED - code returned in API response). All 16 backend API tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 500 with '401: Code invalide' message instead of HTTP 401 for invalid codes
Returns status 200 instead of 201 for POST requests

CodeEditor.js was removed as requested. The SMS authentication returns the verification code in the API response for testing purposes.
